en: And Hiram king of Tyre sent messengers to David, and cedar trees, also masons and carpenters to build a house for him.
zh: 推羅王希蘭派使者來見大衛，給他送上香柏木、石匠和木匠，要為他建造宮殿。

en: And David knew that the LORD had established him as king over Israel, and that his kingdom was highly exalted for the sake of his people Israel.
zh: 那時，大衛知道耶和華已經堅立他作王統治以色列，又為了以色列民的緣故，使他的國高舉。

en: And David took more wives in Jerusalem, and David fathered more sons and daughters.
zh: 大衛在耶路撒冷又娶了多位妻子，並且生了很多兒女。

en: These are the names of the children born to him in Jerusalem: Shammua, Shobab, Nathan, Solomon,
zh: 以下這些就是他在耶路撒冷所生的孩子的名字：沙母亞、朔罷、拿單、所羅門、
以利沙瑪、以利雅大和以利法列。

en: When the Philistines heard that David had been anointed king over all Israel, all the Philistines went up to search for David. But David heard of it and went out against them.
zh: 非利士人聽見了大衛受膏作王統治以色列人，就全體上來搜尋大衛；大衛聽見了，就出來迎擊他們。

en: Now the Philistines had come and made a raid in the Valley of Rephaim.
zh: 非利士人來到，侵進了利乏音谷。

en: And David inquired of God, "Shall I go up against the Philistines? Will you give them into my hand?" And the LORD said to him, "Go up, and I will give them into your hand."
zh: 大衛求問 神說：“我可以上去攻打非利士人嗎？你把他們交在我手裡嗎？”耶和華對他說：“你可以上去，我必把他們交在你的手裡。”

en: And he went up to Baal-perazim, and David struck them down there. And David said, "God has broken through my enemies by my hand, like a bursting flood." Therefore the name of that place is called Baal-perazim.
zh: 非利士人上到巴力．毘拉心來，大衛在那裡擊敗了他們。大衛說：“ 神藉著我擊潰我的敵人，好像水沖破堤岸一般。”因此他們給那地方起名叫巴力．毘拉心。

en: And they left their gods there, and David gave command, and they were burned.
zh: 非利士人把他們的神像遺棄在那裡，大衛吩咐人用火把它們燒了。

en: And the Philistines yet again made a raid in the valley.
zh: 非利士人又再入侵那山谷。

en: And when David again inquired of God, God said to him, "You shall not go up after them; go around and come against them opposite the balsam trees.
zh: 大衛又求問 神， 神對他說：“不可在後面追趕他們，要繞過他們，從桑林對面攻打他們。

en: And when you hear the sound of marching in the tops of the balsam trees, then go out to battle, for God has gone out before you to strike down the army of the Philistines."
zh: 你一聽見桑林樹梢上有腳步的聲音，就要出戰，因為 神已經在你前面出去擊殺非利士人的軍隊了。”

en: And David did as God commanded him, and they struck down the Philistine army from Gibeon to Gezer.
zh: 於是大衛照著 神所吩咐他的去作，他們攻擊非利士人的軍隊，從基遍起，一直攻打到基色。

en: And the fame of David went out into all lands, and the LORD brought the fear of him upon all nations.
zh: 因此大衛的名聲傳遍各地，耶和華使萬國都懼怕他。
